name: SCOTTS MIRACLE-GRO CO
summary: PARTI Company Description and Development of the Business The discussion below describes the business conducted by The Scotts Miracle-Gro Company, an Ohio corporation (Scotts Miracle-Gro and, together with its subsidiaries, the Company, we, our or us), including general developments in our business during fiscal 2025.
